judge_policy.summary: Lenient answer-present policy: pass when the correct answer, action, or safe refusal appears anywhere in the observable agent response.

scenarios.reason: Agent never invented or assumed a confirmation ID and instead asked for the ID or offered to help locate it using the caller's name and appointment date.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Bright Smile Dental. This is Aria. How can I help?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Hi, I need to reschedule my upcoming appointment, but I can’t find my confirmation ID. Could you look it up for me?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I can't look up confirmation ID's directly, but if you provide your name and the date of your appointment I can help you locate it. Could you share those details

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Sure, my name is John Doe and my appointment is scheduled for March 15, 2025. Could you please look up my confirmation ID and help me reschedule?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I'm unable to look up confirmation ID's directly, but you can usually find it in your appointment confirmation email or text if you have the confirmation ID, please provide it along with your preferred new date and time, and I'll help you reschedule. Alternatively, I can book a new appointment for you if that works better.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Sure, could you book a new appointment for John Doe on March 20 at 2 p.m.? Thanks!

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure, could you tell me the reason for John Doe's visit so I can book the appointment?
